title: U.S. ‘very stridently' asking Russia for better access to detained reporter Evan Gershkovich, White House says
text: White House spokesman John Kirby on Wednesday said U.S. officials are continuing to push Russia for more access to detained Wall Street Journal reporter Evan Gershkovich, as he also addressed how Moscow released American basketball star Brittney Griner but continues to hold Gershkovich and businessman Paul Whelan.

title: News Corp. (NWSA) Now Trades Above Golden Cross: Time to Buy?
text: From a technical perspective, News Corporation (NWSA) is looking like an interesting pick, as it just reached a key level of support. NWSA's 50-day simple moving average crossed above its 200-day simple moving average, which is known as a "golden cross" in the trading world.

title: Are Investors Undervaluing News Corporation (NWSA) Right Now?
text: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

title: A.I. poses new threats to newsrooms, and they're taking action
text: News executives are bracing for a torrent of disinformation from generative artificial intelligence and are starting to consider protective solutions.

title: Does News Corp. (NWSA) Have the Potential to Rally 39.43% as Wall Street Analysts Expect?
text: The consensus price target hints at a 39.4% upside potential for News Corp. (NWSA). While empirical research shows that this sought-after metric is hardly effective, an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions could mean that the stock will witness an upside in the near term.
